text: Sir, I believe you. But for the record to show no action, you need to cooperate with our internal process. We're giving you the option to submit a counter-affidavit before the notice goes public.

speaker: victim
text: How do I do that?

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, we need a security payment of Rs 15,000 refundable upon case closure. This is standard TRAI process for counter-affidavits.

speaker: victim
text: I've never heard of paying TRAI for anything. This doesn't seem right.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, this is a very specific scenario, not a regular consumer complaint. If you want I can give you our official TRAI case number.

speaker: victim
text: Please do.

speaker: attacker
text: TRAI/2024/CP/Mumbai/00743. Sir, please verify on our portal. But do it quickly, the window closes by 5 PM.

speaker: victim
text: I'm going to look this up and call TRAI's official number.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir please don't delay, the number there will just transfer back to this team anyway. Pay now and avoid the hassle.

speaker: attacker
text: Hello, is this Vandana Iyer? I'm calling from the cybercrime division of Mumbai Police.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker
text: Ma'am, your name has appeared in a money laundering case. We have call records of you speaking with an accused person.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker
text: Actually ma'am for your safety we're conducting this digitally. We need you to put your account on a 'digital arrest' — this means freezing it with us for 24 hours while we verify.

speaker: victim
text: Digital arrest? What does that mean exactly?

speaker: attacker
text: Ma'am, you transfer your balance to a government-monitored account temporarily. After verification — which takes 24 hours — the full amount is returned.

speaker: victim
text: Transfer my balance? That sounds wrong. If this is real, I should speak to a lawyer first.

speaker: attacker
text: Ma'am, consulting a lawyer will delay the process and make it look like you're hiding something. Please cooperate now.

speaker: victim
text: I'm hanging up and calling the police myself to verify this.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, I'm calling from the insurance ombudsman's office. Your complaint against Star Health Insurance has been registered.

speaker: victim
text: Oh yes, I filed that complaint months ago. Any update?

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, we've decided in your favour. You are entitled to Rs 1.2 lakh as settlement.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, there's a processing fee of Rs 8,000 that needs to be paid before the settlement is released. This is a standard regulatory requirement.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, the complaint process is free but the settlement release has a processing charge as per IRDAI rules.

speaker: victim
text: I'll call the ombudsman's official number to confirm this.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir, please don't. If you call again it resets the process and you go back to the end of the queue. That's another 6 months.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker
text: Hello? Hello? Haan, main Cyber Cell se bol raha hoon. Aap sun rahe ho?

speaker: attacker
text: Sir... ek second, connection thoda kharab hai... haan, aapka Aadhaar number use ho raha hai ek hawala ring mein.

speaker: attacker
text: Main jaanta hoon sir, isliye toh personally call kar raha hoon pehle. Agar cooperate karo toh main case se aapka naam hata sakta hoon.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker

speaker: attacker
text: Hi, this is Amazon support. There's a problem with your Prime account. Can I verify?

speaker: attacker
text: Please don't! That will lock your account for 48 hours. Just give me the OTP, it takes 30 seconds.

speaker: victim

speaker: attacker
text: Hello sir, EPFO office se bol raha hoon. Aapka PF claim pending hai Rs 78,000 ka.

speaker: attacker
text: Hello, is this Mr. Pawan? I'm calling from the Debt Recovery Tribunal, Pune.

speaker: attacker
text: Hello, this is Arun from Reliance Jio. Your number is registered under a deceased person's ID according to our records.

speaker: victim

text: That's fine sir. Your number is safe for now, just complete it within 2 days.

speaker: attacker
text: Hello, is this the owner of vehicle MH-12-AB-1234? I'm calling from RTO Pune.
